steps.action: Click the "Accept All" button to accept the cookie consent dialog.
steps.narration: A cookie consent dialog has appeared at the bottom of the News Website page, showing "This website uses cookies to enhance your experience. Do you accept?" with "Accept All" and "Decline" buttons.

steps.action:
Click the "Download quarterly_report.pdf" button to start the download process.

steps.narration: The File Manager page shows a "Download quarterly_report.pdf" button that hasn't been clicked yet, so I need to first initiate the download.
The download has completed (100%) and a green "Download Complete" toast notification has appeared in the bottom-right corner with an "Open file" button.

steps.action: The task has unfortunately failed - the toast notification timed out before the click registered. The "TIMEOUT: Toast dismissed without action" message confirms the 3-second window was missed. No furt

The Reaction Time Test page is displayed with a dark background, showing a "Click Start to begin" message in the center panel and a purple "Start Test" button below it.

The green "CLICK!" button has appeared on screen, displayed as a large dark green panel with bright green text and border.

steps.action:
I'll wait approximately 6.5 seconds for the counter to reach 42, then click Capture. Since the counter is at 29 and updates every 500ms, I need to wait 13 × 500ms = 6500ms before clicking.

click(640,
steps.narration: The counter has advanced to 29, meaning it needs 13 more increments (6.5 seconds) to reach 42.
